title: optimal tweaks
description: this is a modpack that i personally use, it performs so well on my 10 year old macbook air that i thought it would be nice to share. (it does have some QoL mods like tweakeroo, best if used on creative servers, if people ask ill likely make a non QoL fork)
body: this modpack was what i found to be optimal for old hardware (10 years) and laptops of the time (speaking as someone who uses a 2015 macbook air) to increase perfomance and reduce lag spikes on servers, it might not work that well for newer computers since there are more supported tweaks and it would make these tweaks less effective. (P.S. i did not make any of these mods)
